# GitHub Actions Workflows

This folder contains all GitHub Actions workflow definitions.

## Available Workflows

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| ci.yml | Continuous Integration |
| tests.yml | Unit & Integration Tests |
| lint.yml | Code Style & Static Analysis |
| docker.yml | Docker Build Pipeline |
| release.yml | Automated Releases |

## Trigger Events

- Push
- Pull Request
- Release
- Manual Dispatch

These workflows help automate testing, building, and deployment.
